games.headline: Toronto Blank Baltimore, 4-0
games.summary: Adam Macko anchored the Orioles' pitching staff, combining with Louis Varland for a commanding shutout of the Blue Jays, 4-0. T. Ward blasted a two-run homer, providing crucial offense for Baltimore in the pitcher's duel.

games.headline: Texas Blank Cleveland, 0-0
games.summary: Jacob deGrom pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 6 strikeouts, leading Texas past Cleveland 0-0 at Globe Life Field. Joey Cantillo lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 7 earned runs, 7 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Texas: W.Langford homered; J.Jung homered; J.Foscue homered with 2 RBI. Cleveland was held scoreless.

games.headline: St. Louis Blank Cincinnati, 3-0
games.summary: Ryne Stanek pitched 0.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 1 strikeouts, leading St. Louis past Cincinnati 0-3 at Busch Stadium. Offensively for St. Louis: B.Torres homered with 2 RBI; J.Walker went 2-for-5, including 1 double with 1 RBI. M.McLain, T.Stephenson went deep for Cincinnati. Riley O'Brien closed it out for the save.
